fields.name: Contract Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type of the service contract. There are three options: Quote, Contract, or Template.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Contract Type field in the Service Contract Header table.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the service contract.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Contract No. field in the Service Contract Header table.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the contract/service discount.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the discount becomes applicable to the contract or quote.
